simple_types.code:
type CTRL_UIDE_Field is
   UIMOD,
   UOTGID)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: UIMOD
enumeration_literals.description: The USB mode (device/host) is selected from the UOTGID input pin.

simple_types.code:

   HOST,
   DEVICE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: HOST
enumeration_literals.description: The module is in USB device mode.

simple_types.name: DEVCTRL_SPDCONF_Field
simple_types.code:
type DEVCTRL_SPDCONF_Field is
   NORMAL,
   LOW_POWER,
   HIGH_SPEED,
   FORCED_FS)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: NORMAL
enumeration_literals.description: For a better consumption, if high-speed is not needed.

enumeration_literals.name: HIGH_SPEED
enumeration_literals.description:
The peripheral remains in full-speed mode whatever the host speed
capability.

  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: OUT_k
enumeration_literals.description: The endpoint direction is IN (nor for control endpoints).

simple_types.name: DEVEPTCFG_NBTRANS_Field
simple_types.code:
type DEVEPTCFG_NBTRANS_Field is
   Val_0_TRANS,
   Val_1_TRANS,
   Val_2_TRANS,
   Val_3_TRANS)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: Val_0_TRANS
enumeration_literals.description: default value: one transaction per micro-frame.

enumeration_literals.name: Val_1_TRANS
enumeration_literals.description:
2 transactions per micro-frame. This endpoint should be configured as
double-bank.

enumeration_literals.name: Val_2_TRANS
enumeration_literals.description:
3 transactions per micro-frame. This endpoint should be configured as
triple-bank.

enumeration_literals.description: Data2 toggle sequence (for high-bandwidth isochronous endpoint)

enumeration_literals.name: DATA2
enumeration_literals.description: MData toggle sequence (for high-bandwidth isochronous endpoint)

simple_types.name: FSM_DRDSTATE_Field
simple_types.code:
type FSM_DRDSTATE_Field is
   A_IDLESTATE,
   A_WAIT_VRISE,
   A_WAIT_BCON,
   A_HOST,
   A_SUSPEND,
   A_PERIPHERAL,
   A_WAIT_VFALL,
   A_VBUS_ERR,
,
,
,
,
,
,
   …,
   B_SRP_INIT)
  with Size => 4;

enumeration_literals.name: A_IDLESTATE
enumeration_literals.description:
In this state, the A-device waits for the voltage on VBus to rise above the
A-device VBus Valid threshold (4.4 V).

enumeration_literals.name: A_WAIT_VRISE
enumeration_literals.description: In this state, the A-device waits for the B-device to signal a connection.

enumeration_literals.name: A_WAIT_BCON
enumeration_literals.description: In this state, the A-device that operates in Host mode is operational.

enumeration_literals.name: A_HOST
enumeration_literals.description: The A-device operating as a host is in the suspend mode.

enumeration_literals.name: A_SUSPEND
enumeration_literals.description: The A-device operates as a peripheral.

enumeration_literals.name: A_PERIPHERAL
enumeration_literals.description:
In this state, the A-device waits for the voltage on VBus to drop below the
A-device Session Valid threshold (1.4 V).

enumeration_literals.name: A_WAIT_VFALL
enumeration_literals.description:
In this state, the A-device waits for recovery of the over-current
condition that caused it to enter this state.

enumeration_literals.name: A_VBUS_ERR
enumeration_literals.description:
In this state, the A-device waits for the data USB line to discharge (100
us).

enumeration_literals.name: A_WAIT_DISCHARGE
enumeration_literals.description: This is the start state for B-device (when the ID pin is 1).

enumeration_literals.name: B_IDLE
enumeration_literals.description: In this state, the B-device acts as the peripheral.

enumeration_literals.name: B_PERIPHERAL
enumeration_literals.description:
In this state, the B-device is in suspend mode and waits until 3 ms before
initiating the HNP protocol if requested.

enumeration_literals.name: B_WAIT_BEGIN_HNP
enumeration_literals.description:
In this state, the B-device waits for the data USB line to discharge (100
us) before becoming Host.

enumeration_literals.name: B_WAIT_DISCHARGE
enumeration_literals.description:
In this state, the B-device waits for the A-device to signal a connect
before becoming B-Host.

enumeration_literals.name: B_WAIT_ACON
enumeration_literals.description: In this state, the B-device acts as the Host.

enumeration_literals.name: B_HOST
enumeration_literals.description:
In this state, the B-device attempts to start a session using the SRP
protocol.

simple_types.name: HSTCTRL_SPDCONF_Field

type HSTCTRL_SPDCONF_Field is
   NORMAL,
   LOW_POWER,

enumeration_literals.name: NORMAL
enumeration_literals.description: For a better consumption, if high-speed is not needed.

enumeration_literals.name: HIGH_SPEED
enumeration_literals.description:
The host remains to full-speed mode whatever the peripheral speed
capability.
